issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios such as missing brand assets or incomplete brand information, limiting its robustness.
The skill lacks runnable code or concrete procedures that can be directly executed by an AI agent, reducing immediate usability.

scenarios.name: eco-coffee-shop-guidelines
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits explicit do’s and visual examples of correct usage.

scenarios.name: saas-dark-mode-update
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides a detailed, ready‑to‑copy update covering all rubric items, while Response A is empty.
